description:
Overview:

★ Can replace traditional albums, and wooden photo frames, very suitable for shopping malls, hotels, cafes, milk tea shops and other photos/advertising/music playback, to meet the needs of different scenes.

★ Automatically identify photos, video, music content, and automatic playback. Ideal for all users, especially old people and children.

★ Support full HD video play, clear and smooth, refused to make you enjoy the feelings.

★ Music supports MP3, WMA format, with double-proof speakers, while appreciating photos, also provides you with clear sound.


Product Information:
Screen Size: 5 inches (in)
Resolution: 854*480
Brightness (lumens) : 350 lumens
Features: Ultra-thin
Material: acrylic + plastic + screen
Support picture playback, picture format: JPG, BMP, support music playback, support video playback: video format: AVI, MP4 video support 720P
Built-in 3.7V 1500 mah lithium battery
Interface: Type-C (Connect computer to download and delete content via data cable)
Switch mode: Press the button
Data cable: Type-C  data cable, magnetic absorption data cable.

Size details:

5 inches: 159mm*105mm*28mm
7 inches: 211mm*145mm*28mm
10 inches: 274mm*188mm*28mm

Packing list:
Electronic album x1
